key_items: Bitcoin Price Falls 5.5% in 5 Days to Below 73,000 as Spot ETF Outflows Accelerate
Bitcoin Traders Increasingly Convinced Price Will Fall Below $70K by End of May -- Prediction market odds rising
Crypto Majors Slide on Iran Escalations, ETF Outflows -- Massive ETF outflows sent crypto sharply lower
reasoning: Bitcoin faces near-term headwinds from accelerating spot ETF outflows, geopolitical tensions (US-Iran escalation), and prediction markets pricing in a break below $70K within days. However, bullish long-term narratives (ARK's $750K target, institutional adoption via Stacks staking, Standard Chartered's bullish Ethereum metrics) and open CME futures gaps at $67K provide technical support that prevents a stronger bearish rating.
risks: Sustained ETF outflows combined with geopolitical risk escalation could trigger panic selling toward $67K-$70K CME gap levels within 1-3 days.
